title: Self-as-Archetype (Stacking Personas Without Leakage)
html:
Stub. First mentioned in 2026 02 26 i want to be the motherfucker that falls backwards into the.

Yahir's self-direction move: name multiple distinct personas (void-faller, war-leader, butterfly-at-home) and aim to render each one fully without bleed between them. The contrast is the goal, not the consistency.

related.label: Distinguishing your self doesn't mean getting ahead, bringing something to the table of value is what gets you ahead
Falls Backwards Into the Void with a Smile — Self-Image Manifesto
